gold.rationale: 样本文本一方面对“俄乌战场无人系统广泛使用（无人机、UGV、遥控武器站等）”的背景描述有现实依据，但同时把来源不明、可能为演示/拼接的画面套入“近日俄乌前线实拍”的具体战线语境，并使用经过明显加枪与水印时间码处理的截图强化“持枪人形机器人”的观感，导致读者对时间、地点与事件属性形成实质性误解。

atomic_points.post_summary: 近日，多家社交平台流传一组被称为“战场机器人”的画面，引起网友关注。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 近日，多家社交平台流传一组被称为“战场机器人”的画面，引起网友关注。
atoms: Multiple social media platforms circulated images called 'battlefield robots'.
The circulation of these images caused public attention.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 3 月 26 日，微博账号“李锦泉”（认证：星座命理博主）发帖抛出话题“俄乌战场惊现持枪人形机器人”，并附上链接及多张图片/画面截图（共 6 张）。
atoms: On March 26, Weibo account 'Li Jinquan' posted content.
Account 'Li Jinquan' is certified as a horoscope blogger.
The post topic was 'Humanoid robots with guns appear on the Russia-Ukraine battlefield'.
The post included a link and multiple image/video screenshots.
The post contained a total of 6 images/screenshots.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 帖文配套文字将其描述为“持枪人形机器人上战场”，相关内容随后被大量转发，扩散至多个平台。
atoms: The post text described the content as 'Humanoid robots with guns going to the battlefield'.
The content was forwarded extensively.
The content spread to multiple platforms.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 从网传截图与短视频片段来看，画面重点集中在三段场景：一段显示一台类人形平台在开阔地带前进，上肢保持持握姿态，枪口指向前方；
atoms: Net-circulated screenshots and short video clips focus on three scenes.
One scene shows a humanoid platform moving in an open area.
In this scene, the upper limbs held a posture.
In this scene, the gun muzzle pointed forward.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 另一段为更近距离的侧面镜头，主体轮廓呈现“人形躯干 + 双腿”的结构，步伐节奏接近步行；
atoms: Another segment is a closer side-angle shot.
The subject outline shows a 'humanoid torso + legs' structure.
The walking pace rhythm was close to human walking.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 还有一段较为晃动的随身视角片段，拍摄者与目标距离缩短后，可看到其头部与胸前疑似安装有传感器组件。
atoms: There was another shaky handheld perspective segment.
After the camera distance shortened to the target, the head and chest area appeared to have sensor components installed.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 在流传的截图中，有一张被视为“核心图像”的画面带有类似新闻水印与时间码的标记。
atoms: Among the circulated screenshots, one image was considered the 'core image'.
This image had markings similar to news watermarks and timecodes.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 该图像局部阴影更深、边缘更锐化，手部附近出现较清晰的长条状武器轮廓，使“手持步枪”的观感更突出。
atoms: The image had deeper local shadows and sharper edges.
Near the hand area, a clear long-bar weapon outline appeared.
This made the visual impression of 'holding a rifle' more prominent.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 另有两张画面背景为残破建筑与裸露地面，有转发者据此解读为“废弃工业区临时阵地”。
atoms: Two other images had backgrounds of ruined buildings and exposed ground.
Forwarders interpreted this as a 'temporary position in an abandoned industrial zone'.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 从传播路径看，这组素材多为社交媒体转发与二次传播版本，原始拍摄账号、拍摄设备信息以及完整片段并未在同一条帖子中完整呈现。
atoms: From the transmission path, the material was mostly social media forwards and secondary versions.
The original shooting account information was not fully presented.
The shooting equipment information was not fully presented.
The complete video segment was not fully presented in the single post.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 由于画面在流传过程中多次剪辑、叠加字幕并被截帧，单凭个别帖文难以确认具体拍摄时间与地点。
atoms: The images were edited multiple times during circulation.
Subtitles were overlaid on the images.
Frames were cropped.
Based on individual posts alone, it is difficult to confirm the specific shooting time and location.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 与此同时，部分“前线频道”在转述时称，画面据称拍摄于顿涅茨克方向前沿阵地，并把其中一段步行镜头指向扎波罗热战线某处阵地巡逻场景，称其为“本周前线实拍”。
atoms: Some 'frontline channels' stated the images were allegedly shot at the Donetsk direction front-line position.
They pointed one walking clip to a patrol scene at a certain position on the Zaporizhzhia front line.
They called it 'this week's frontline real shot'.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 画面本身也存在一定的外观混淆空间。
atoms: The images themselves have a certain space for visual confusion.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 有观察人士指出，在远距离、清晰度较低的前线影像中，“人形机器人”容易与地面无人平台、遥控武器站以及部分穿戴式外骨骼装备混为一谈。
atoms: An observer pointed out that in distant, low-clarity frontline images, 'humanoid robots' are easily confused with ground unmanned platforms.
They are also easily confused with remote weapon stations.
They are also easily confused with some wearable exoskeleton equipment.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 比如履带或轮式底盘搭载遥控武器站时，如果拍摄角度遮挡底盘，画面可能出现“上半身似人形”的错觉；
atoms: When remote weapon stations are mounted on tracked or wheeled chassis, if the shooting angle blocks the chassis, the image may show an illusion of 'upper body resembling a humanoid'.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 一些训练演示类设备在镜头裁切后，也可能被误读为战场部署画面。
atoms: Some training demonstration equipment, after being cropped by the lens, may also be misread as battlefield deployment scenes.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 就俄乌战场无人系统的使用现状而言，无人化作战已较为普遍。
atoms: Regarding the current status of unmanned systems on the Russia-Ukraine battlefield, unmanned warfare is already quite common.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 公开报道显示，双方长期大量使用无人机执行侦察、投弹与攻击任务；
atoms: Public reports show that both sides have long used drones extensively for reconnaissance, bomb drops, and attack missions.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 地面端也出现多种无人平台，包括履带或轮式小型无人车用于侦察、运补、排爆，以及加装武器模块的改装平台。
atoms: On the ground, various unmanned platforms have appeared.
These include tracked or wheeled small unmanned vehicles used for reconnaissance, logistics, and EOD.
These include modified platforms with added weapon modules.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 外媒此前也报道过乌方武装地面机器人系统在近距离交火中的运用案例，并有多段 UGV 在火力覆盖区域承担补给与后送任务的视频流出。
atoms: Foreign media previously reported cases of Ukrainian armed ground robot systems being used in close-range firefights.
Multiple video clips of UGVs undertaking logistics and evacuation tasks in areas under fire coverage have leaked out.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 围绕这次“人形平台”话题，社交媒体主要出现两类解读：一类认为画面中的“步态”与“上肢持枪姿态”更贴近人形平台，可能意味着前线正在尝试更复杂的机器人形态，用于阵地巡逻与火力支援；
atoms: Regarding the 'humanoid platform' topic, social media mainly showed two types of interpretations.
One type believes the 'gait' and 'upper limb holding gun posture' in the images are closer to humanoid platforms.
This may mean the front line is trying more complex robot forms.
The purpose is for position patrol and fire support.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 另一类观点则倾向认为，这些片段可能源自某种演示或训练素材，被剪辑后再叠加字幕、水印与截帧，从而被套入前线语境，引发外界对地点与用途的联想。
atoms: The other viewpoint tends to believe these clips may originate from some demonstration or training material.
They were edited, then subtitles, watermarks, and frames were overlaid.
This caused them to be placed in a frontline context.
This triggered public speculation about location and usage.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 有业内人士对记者表示，即便地面无人平台加速普及，“双足人形 + 持枪”仍要面对稳定性、续航、负载、抗干扰以及维护成本等多重门槛。
atoms: An industry insider told reporters that even if ground unmanned platforms accelerate popularization, 'bipedal humanoid + holding gun' still faces multiple thresholds.
These thresholds include stability, endurance, load, anti-interference, and maintenance costs.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 相较之下，轮式/履带式 UGV 搭载遥控武器站的技术路线更成熟，模块化集成也更便于快速扩编。
atoms: In comparison, the technical route of UGVs with remote weapon stations on wheels/tracks is more mature.
Modular integration is also easier for rapid expansion.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 不过，他同时提到，一旦人形平台在复杂地形通过性、上下障碍以及近距离感知等方面取得突破，前线对“替代单兵进入高风险区域”的需求，可能推动其更快进入实战化试用。
atoms: However, he also mentioned that if humanoid platforms achieve breakthroughs in complex terrain passability, climbing obstacles, and close-range perception, the demand for 'replacing soldiers to enter high-risk areas' on the front line may push them to enter combat trials faster.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 随着无人机、UGV 和遥控武器站持续升级，围绕“科幻走进现实”的讨论仍在延续。
atoms: With drones, UGVs, and remote weapon stations continuously upgrading, discussions around 'sci-fi coming to reality' are still continuing.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 多名前线消息转述者认为，若未来人形平台能够与空中侦察、地面车队及火力模块实现协同，人机混合编组的战术形态或将出现新的变化，战场自动化程度也可能进一步提升。
atoms: Multiple frontline message forwarders believe that if future humanoid platforms can achieve coordination with aerial reconnaissance, ground vehicle convoys, and fire modules, the tactical formation of human-machine mixed groups may show new changes.
The level of battlefield automation may also be further improved.

paragraph_level: The post asserts that images of 'battlefield robots' circulating on social media depict humanoid platforms with guns in the Russia-Ukraine conflict.
The post claims that while the images show humanoid-like features, they could be confused with ground unmanned platforms, remote weapon stations, or exoskeletons due to low clarity and editing.
The post states that unmanned warfare is already common in the Russia-Ukraine conflict, with both sides using drones and various ground unmanned vehicles.
The post argues that humanoid robots face technical thresholds like stability and endurance, whereas wheeled/tracked UGVs with remote weapon stations are more mature.
The post suggests that future breakthroughs in humanoid robot capabilities could lead to new human-machine mixed tactical formations and increased battlefield automation.
The post notes that the specific location and time of the viral images cannot be confirmed due to multiple edits and lack of original source data.
retrieval_queries: 顿涅茨克 前沿阵地
废弃工业区 临时阵地
稳定性 续航 负载
俄罗斯 乌克兰 冲突

quoted_text_and_attributions.quoted_text: 俄乌战场惊现持枪人形机器人
持枪人形机器人上战场

atoms: A Weibo post by user '李锦泉' (Li Jinquan) with a verified blue checkmark.
The post includes a profile picture of a blue ocean scene.
The post text states: 'Future, robots will be used in many fields, such as fighting, disaster rescue, and many high-risk jobs.'
The post metadata indicates it was published on 25-12-21 at 18:11 from an iPhone client in Hebei.
The user profile has a 'V' verification badge and a 'I' icon next to the name.
A golden statue of a monkey character resembling Sun Wukong from Journey to the West.
The statue is holding a silver assault rifle (resembling an AK-47) over its shoulder.
The monkey figure is wearing traditional golden armor and a red sash.
The statue is standing on a golden cloud base.
A red tassel hangs from the rifle.
A digital timestamp '2026-03-25 16:20:13' is visible in the top left corner.
The text 'FRONT CAM' is visible in the bottom right corner.
A group of soldiers in camouflage uniforms and helmets walking outdoors.
The soldiers are carrying large backpacks and military equipment.
One soldier in the foreground is holding a large green box-like object.
The soldiers are wearing green armbands.
The background shows a rural area with trees, a fence, and a dirt road.
The lighting suggests it is daytime.
A composite image comparing a 'Real' robot on the left with a 'Fake' AI-generated one on the right.
The 'Real' image shows a silver humanoid robot with 'UNITREE' text on its chest and arm.
The 'Fake' image shows a similar robot but with distorted 'YUTRE' text on its arm and chest.
Red circles highlight the text 'UNITREE' in the 'Real' image and 'YUTRE' in the 'Fake' image.
The 'Fake' image includes a zoomed-in crop showing the distorted text.
Labels 'Real' and 'Fake' are present in green and red boxes respectively.
The 'Fake' label also includes the text 'AI-generated'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A screenshot of a Weibo post by user Li Jinquan. The post features a profile picture of the ocean and text discussing the future use of robots in fields like fighting and disaster rescue. The post includes metadata showing the date, time, device, and location.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 李锦泉 25-12-21 18:11 来自 iPhone 客户端 发布于 河北 未来，机器人将被用于很多领域，如打仗、抢险救灾以及风险系数高的很多工作。
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The post text discusses the future of robots in combat and high-risk jobs, which aligns with the theme of the other images.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A digital rendering or photograph of a golden statue of a monkey warrior holding a rifle. The image has a digital timestamp in the top left and 'FRONT CAM' text in the bottom right, suggesting it is a screenshot from a security camera or a generated image mimicking one.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image depicts a 'robot' (monkey statue) holding a weapon, directly visualizing the 'fighting' and 'robot' concepts mentioned in the post text.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A photograph of several soldiers in military gear walking in a rural, outdoor setting. They are carrying heavy equipment, including backpacks and what appears to be a large box or weapon system.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows soldiers in a combat or training environment, visually representing the 'fighting' and 'risk' aspects mentioned in the post text.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An infographic comparing a 'Real' robot image with an 'AI-generated' 'Fake' one. The comparison highlights the distortion of the 'UNITREE' logo on the robot's body in the fake version, which appears as 'YUTRE'.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image provides evidence regarding the authenticity of robot images, addressing the 'fake' or 'AI-generated' nature of the 'robot' images discussed in the post text.

retrieved_evidence.text:
#俄乌战场惊现持枪人形机器人##持枪人形机器人上战场了##电影终结者可能要成真了#我此前曾明确指出，机器人将被用于打仗。http://t.cn/AXtkFjEo

在我说完不久，机器人已至少两次出现在战场上，这充分印证了我此前的预测。 ​​​
多位欧洲防务研究领域人士近日在接受采访时表示，前线画面中所谓“人形机器人”与现有的地面无人平台、遥控武器站以及士兵佩戴的外骨骼类装备在外观上容易产生混淆。据介绍，一些遥控武器站和改装平台在夜间或低清晰度画面中，可能呈现类似立式人形的轮廓，再加上附加装甲、支架和武器组件等结构，使远距离观察者难以在短时间内准确辨识，从而为相关画面解读带来一定误判空间。
3月下旬，微博平台上一则关于“俄乌战场惊现持枪人形机器人”的话题引发关注。据悉，3月26日，认证为星座命理博主的账号“李锦泉”发布相关内容，配文称在俄乌前线出现疑似携带武器的人形机械装置，并附上链接及多张画面截图。该博主在帖文中展示了共约6张图片与画面截帧，声称来源为战场现场记录，引来大量网民围观与转发，具体细节仍在社交平台上持续发酵。
有军事观察人士近日在接受相关媒体采访时表示，自俄乌冲突爆发以来，双方在前线长期大量部署各类无人化装备，尤其是用于侦察、投弹和定点打击的小型无人机。据介绍，战场上还多次出现履带式或轮式小型地面无人平台，被用于近距离侦察、运送物资、处理爆炸物等任务，部分平台也被改装为可搭载轻型武器的发射或射击装置，这些情况已在多方公开报道中出现。
近年来俄乌战场不断传出关于新型无人作战平台的报道，其中部分资料提到在疑似前线环境中出现具有人形外观、表面轮廓类似躯干与四肢的新型装备。根据相关描述，这类平台通常置于堑壕、废墟建筑或开阔地带附近，与传统步兵活动区域相近，被用于在火力威胁较大的地段执行观察、警戒或简易支援任务，引发外界对人形机器人是否已被投入俄乌实战的关注。
对于社交网络上流传的“持枪人形机器人”画面，多名熟悉网络传播情况的人士近日指出，相关视频与图片多通过不同社交平台的转发和二次编辑在网络扩散。据这些人士介绍，当前在社交媒体上流传的一些战场片段往往缺乏完整拍摄信息，仅凭单一帖文难以准确判断其具体拍摄时间和地点，部分素材来源与原始上传渠道也尚未公开披露，相关情况仍有待更多信息补充。
多家国防研究机构在梳理俄乌冲突战例时指出，轮式或履带式地面无人平台（UGV）已在前线被反复使用，用于侦察、伤员转运、弹药和物资运补以及搭载遥控武器站实施火力支援。据战场经历人员介绍，这些低矮的平台通常通过无线电遥控或半自主导航在战壕间与废墟环境中穿行，已成为俄军和乌军减少士兵暴露、提高火力持续性的常见装备背景，为进一步发展更复杂的无人地面系统提供了实践基础。

在机器人技术公开展示领域，俄乌冲突爆发前后，欧美和俄罗斯均曾在展会、军工论坛或室内测试场中演示具有双足或多足结构的人形机器人平台。相关资料显示，这类平台多在光线较好的大厅或标线清晰的实验区域内行走、转身、举臂或做出警戒姿态，重点验证机动性、平衡控制与人机交互能力。虽然这些展示原本面向技术验证与宣传，但在俄乌战场出现大量无人装备的背景下，人形平台是否、以及何时会从实验场景扩展到前线应用，已成为地缘政治与军备竞赛讨论中的重要话题之一。
在俄乌冲突技术应用的讨论中，有关人士提到部分人形平台样式的装备前部或右侧可见类似枪托和枪管的结构，被推测为集成轻武器或遥控武器组件。按军工领域专家的说法，这类装置若搭载火控与稳定机构，理论上可执行定点射击或火力掩护任务，而资料中出现的时间码样式标记和灰绿色画质风格，也使其被不少观察者视作可能与监控或前线记录系统相关的技术试验场合。

This image had markings similar to news watermarks and timecodes.
The image had deeper local shadows and sharper edges.
Near the hand area, a clear long-bar weapon outline appeared.
This made the visual impression of 'holding a rifle' more prominent.
Two other images had backgrounds of ruined buildings and exposed ground.
Forwarders interpreted this as a 'temporary position in an abandoned industrial zone'.
From the transmission path, the material was mostly social media forwards and secondary versions.
The original shooting account information was not fully presented.
The shooting equipment information was not fully presented.
The complete video segment was not fully presented in the single post.
The images were edited multiple times during circulation.
Subtitles were overlaid on the images.
Frames were cropped.
Based on individual posts alone, it is difficult to confirm the specific shooting time and location.
Some 'frontline channels' stated the images were allegedly shot at the Donetsk direction front-line position.
They pointed one walking clip to a patrol scene at a certain position on the Zaporizhzhia front line.
They called it 'this week's frontline real shot'.
The images themselves have a certain space for visual confusion.
An observer pointed out that in distant, low-clarity frontline images, 'humanoid robots' are easily confused with ground unmanned platforms.
They are also easily confused with remote weapon stations.
They are also easily confused with some wearable exoskeleton equipment.
When remote weapon stations are mounted on tracked or wheeled chassis, if the shooting angle blocks the chassis, the image may show an illusion of 'upper body resembling a humanoid'.
Some training demonstration equipment, after being cropped by the lens, may also be misread as battlefield deployment scenes.
Regarding the current status of unmanned systems on the Russia-Ukraine battlefield, unmanned warfare is already quite common.
Public reports show that both sides have long used drones extensively for reconnaissance, bomb drops, and attack missions.
On the ground, various unmanned platforms have appeared.
These include tracked or wheeled small unmanned vehicles used for reconnaissance, logistics, and EOD.
These include modified platforms with added weapon modules.
Foreign media previously reported cases of Ukrainian armed ground robot systems being used in close-range firefights.
Multiple video clips of UGVs undertaking logistics and evacuation tasks in areas under fire coverage have leaked out.
Regarding the 'humanoid platform' topic, social media mainly showed two types of interpretations.
One type believes the 'gait' and 'upper limb holding gun posture' in the images are closer to humanoid platforms.
This may mean the front line is trying more complex robot forms.
The purpose is for position patrol and fire support.
The other viewpoint tends to believe these clips may originate from some demonstration or training material.
They were edited, then subtitles, watermarks, and frames were overlaid.
This caused them to be placed in a frontline context.
This triggered public speculation about location and usage.
An industry insider told reporters that even if ground unmanned platforms accelerate popularization, 'bipedal humanoid + holding gun' still faces multiple thresholds.
These thresholds include stability, endurance, load, anti-interference, and maintenance costs.
In comparison, the technical route of UGVs with remote weapon stations on wheels/tracks is more mature.
Modular integration is also easier for rapid expansion.

However, he also mentioned that if humanoid platforms achieve breakthroughs in complex terrain passability, climbing obstacles, and close-range perception, the demand for 'replacing soldiers to enter high-risk areas' on the front line may push them to enter combat trials faster.
With drones, UGVs, and remote weapon stations continuously upgrading, discussions around 'sci-fi coming to reality' are still continuing.

Multiple frontline message forwarders believe that if future humanoid platforms can achieve coordination with aerial reconnaissance, ground vehicle convoys, and fire modules, the tactical formation of human-machine mixed groups may show new changes.
The level of battlefield automation may also be further improved.

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the viral event and technical skepticism but fails to distinguish the specific source of the viral images (a horoscope post) from the actual battlefield footage shown in the images, creating a misleading context regarding the origin of the visual evidence.
text_analysis.t3_evidence: The post text states the viral images are from a 'horoscope blogger' (Li Jinquan) claiming battlefield footage, whereas the evidence (src_206_1) shows the image is actually a screenshot of a horoscope post about future robot uses, and the actual battlefield footage (image 3) is a separate, unrelated event.
t3_problematic_subclaims: The post conflates the horoscope post content with the viral battlefield images, implying the horoscope post contains the battlefield footage when the evidence shows the horoscope post is about future predictions and the battlefield footage is a separate image.

The post claims the viral images are 'frontline real shots' attributed to the horoscope account, while the evidence shows the horoscope account posted a generic prediction and the actual battlefield footage is a distinct image not originating from that specific horoscope context.
text_analysis.c1_evidence: The post text describes the viral images as 'humanoid robots with guns' and 'frontline footage', but image 1 (01_img_1.jpg) is a screenshot of a horoscope post discussing future robot uses, and image 3 (03_img_3.jpg) depicts soldiers in rural gear, not the specific 'humanoid robot' described in the text.
c1_problematic_subclaims: The text claims the images show 'humanoid robots with guns' on the battlefield, but image 1 shows a horoscope post about future robot predictions, not the battlefield footage itself.

The text implies the viral images are the specific 'humanoid robot' footage, but the provided images (01_img_1.jpg, 02_img_2.jpg, 03_img_3.jpg) show a horoscope post, a monkey statue, and soldiers, none of which match the described 'humanoid robot' entity.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is largely accurate in its reporting of the viral trend and technical skepticism but fails to correctly attribute the source of the visual evidence, conflating a horoscope prediction post with the actual battlefield footage.

images.scene_description: A golden statue of a monkey-like figure in armor holding a rifle, standing on a cloud base against a blue background with a timestamp overlay.
images.v1_evidence: The image depicts a highly stylized, golden statue of a monkey figure holding a rifle, which is a fictional or artistic representation rather than a candid photograph of a real-world battlefield event or a technical demonstration of a human-shaped robot.
images.c_evidence: The post text discusses 'human-shaped robots' (人形机器人) in a conflict zone, but the image shows a golden statue of a monkey (Sun Wukong) holding a gun, which is a completely different entity and context.
images.explanation: The image is a synthetic or artistic depiction of a monkey statue, which contradicts the post's claim about 'human-shaped robots' and the ground truth evidence describing technical platforms or demonstrations.

images.scene_description: Soldiers in camouflage uniforms are passing a large, boxy, wheeled weapon system through a gate.
images.c_evidence: The post text claims the images show 'human-shaped robots' (人形机器人), but this image clearly shows human soldiers operating a wheeled weapon platform, which is a different entity and event.
images.explanation: The image shows human soldiers with a wheeled weapon system, which contradicts the post's specific claim about 'human-shaped robots' and the ground truth evidence describing robot platforms.

images.scene_description: A collage comparing a 'Real' robot with 'Fake' AI-generated versions, highlighting text artifacts on the robot's chest.
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite collage with explicit labels 'Real' and 'Fake' and red circles highlighting text artifacts, indicating it is an edited analysis image rather than a raw field photo.
images.c_evidence: The post text claims the images show 'human-shaped robots' in a conflict zone, but this image is a technical analysis collage comparing a robot to AI fakes, which is a different context and entity.
images.explanation: The image is an edited analysis collage comparing a robot to AI fakes, which contradicts the post's claim about 'human-shaped robots' in a conflict zone and the ground truth evidence describing technical platforms or demonstrations.

images.scene_description: Soldiers in camouflage uniforms are passing a large, boxy, wheeled weapon system through a gate.
images.c_evidence: The post text claims the images show 'human-shaped robots' (人形机器人) in a conflict zone, but this image clearly shows human soldiers operating a wheeled weapon platform, which is a different entity and event.
images.explanation: The image shows human soldiers with a wheeled weapon system, which contradicts the post's specific claim about 'human-shaped robots' and the ground truth evidence describing robot platforms.

image_analysis.global_notes: All four images provided in the input are either artistic depictions, human soldiers operating wheeled platforms, or technical analysis collages. None of them depict the 'human-shaped robots' (人形机器人) described in the post text or the ground truth evidence, resulting in a consistent C1 entity mismatch across all images.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖文声称图片展示了俄乌战场的人形机器人，但提供的图片实为星座博主微博截图、孙悟空雕像、机器人真假对比图及士兵与无人车照片，图文严重不符且图片存在合成与编辑误导，核心事实错误。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post text describes battlefield footage, but the images are completely unrelated (horoscope, statue, infographic, UGV). The images are synthetic or edited to mislead, and the text context is wrong. This is a classic case of image-from-different-event with synthetic visuals.
judge.core_claim: The post claims that images circulating on social media depict 'humanoid robots with guns' on the Russia-Ukraine battlefield, citing a horoscope blogger as the source, while also discussing the technical feasibility of such robots.
key_subclaims: The viral images are from a horoscope blogger named 'Li Jinquan' claiming to show battlefield footage.
The images depict humanoid robots with guns in combat zones.
The images are real battlefield footage from Donetsk or Zaporizhzhia.
The images provided in the post (01_img_1.jpg, 02_img_2.jpg, 03_img_3.jpg, 04_img_4.jpg) are the actual viral battlefield footage.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The viral images are from a horoscope blogger named 'Li Jinquan' claiming to show battlefield footage.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms Li Jinquan is a horoscope blogger who posted about robots fighting, but the specific 'battlefield footage' images are distinct from his horoscope post content.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The images depict humanoid robots with guns in combat zones.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 1 is a screenshot of a horoscope post, not battlefield footage. Image 2 is a golden monkey statue. Image 3 is a collage of 'Real' vs 'Fake' robot images. Image 4 shows soldiers with a weapon system, not a humanoid robot.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The images are real battlefield footage from Donetsk or Zaporizhzhia.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 2 is a statue of Sun Wukong. Image 3 is an infographic. Image 4 shows soldiers with a wheeled weapon system, not a humanoid robot.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The images provided in the post are the actual viral battlefield footage.
subclaim_findings.note: The provided images do not match the description of 'humanoid robots with guns' on the battlefield. They are a horoscope post, a statue, an infographic, and a photo of soldiers with a UGV.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post claims the images show 'humanoid robots with guns' on the battlefield, but the images provided are a horoscope post, a statue, an infographic, and a photo of soldiers with a UGV. This constitutes a severe mismatch between the text and the images (C1/C2), and the images are synthetic or edited to mislead (V1/V2). The core claim that the images show battlefield robots is false.

image_findings.explanation: The image is a screenshot of a horoscope post, which contradicts the post's claim that it shows 'humanoid robots with guns' on the battlefield (C1/C2). The image is edited to show the post content (V2).
The image is a golden statue of a monkey (Sun Wukong) holding a rifle, which is clearly not a battlefield robot (V1/V2). It is presented as if it were a real battlefield image (C1/C2).
The image is an infographic comparing 'Real' and 'Fake' robot images, not the actual battlefield footage described (V1/V2). It is used to support a claim about battlefield footage (C1/C2).
The image shows soldiers with a wheeled weapon system (UGV), not a humanoid robot (C1/C2). The image is edited to show soldiers passing a weapon system (V2).
